18.2-248.title: Manufacturing, selling, giving, distributing, or possessing with intent to manufacture, sell, give, or distribute a controlled substance or an imitation controlled substance

18.2-460.title: Obstructing justice; resistance to execution of lawful process; penalty

18.2-137.title: Injuring, destroying, defacing, or removing property, real or personal, not one's own
18.2-137.penalty: Class 1 Misdemeanor (Class 6 Felony if value exceeds $1,000)

46.2-894.title: Duty of driver to stop, etc., in event of accident involving injury or death or damage to attended property; penalty
46.2-894.penalty: Class 5 Felony (Class 1 Misdemeanor if property damage under $1,000)

46.2-301.title: Driving while license, permit, or privilege to drive suspended or revoked

46.2-391.title: Revocation of license for conviction of driving while intoxicated

29.1-521.title: Unlawful hunting, trapping, fishing, or possession of wild birds or wild animals

16.1-253.1.title: Preliminary protective order in cases of family abuse
16.1-253.1.penalty: Statutory Order / Violation constitutes Class 1 Misdemeanor

18.2-371.1.title: Abuse and neglect of children; penalty
18.2-371.1.penalty: Class 4 Felony (Class 6 Felony if no serious injury)
